description: Last regular-season week before a head-to-head fantasy playoff bracket. Competing managers are locking seeds, managing minutes, and streaming categories where allowed.
narrative_signals: late-season rest risk for stars on locked playoff seeds
must-win games for teams fighting to avoid the play-in
back-to-back fatigue and targeted minutes caps
waiver-wire streaming for threes, steals, and games-played volume
injury reports shifting from day-to-day to 'playoff preservation' language
